description: You are a Computer Systems Analyst at a healthcare IT company. Create a concept map in Wondershare EdrawMax visualizing the integration architecture for an Electronic Health Record (EHR) modernization project. The diagram must include nine nodes: 'EHR System' (central), 'Patient Portal', 'Clinical Database', 'HL7 FHIR API', 'Lab Integration', 'Pharmacy System', 'Billing Module', 'Authentication Service', and 'Audit Logging'. Connect the nodes with directional labels: 'EHR System' serves 'Patient Portal', 'EHR System' stores data in 'Clinical Database', 'EHR System' exposes 'HL7 FHIR API', 'HL7 FHIR API' connects to 'Lab Integration', 'HL7 FHIR API' communicates with 'Pharmacy System', 'EHR System' triggers 'Billing Module', 'Authentication Service' secures 'EHR System', 'Audit Logging' monitors 'EHR System', and 'Patient Portal' reads from 'Clinical Database'. Arrange the diagram as a network with 'EHR System' in the center. Save the source file to /home/ga/Documents/ehr_concept_map.eddx and export the image to /home/ga/Documents/ehr_concept_map.png.
